from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_49d1d64f(I):
    x1 = shape(I)
    x2 = add(x1, TWO)
    x3 = canvas(ZERO, x2)
    x4 = asobject(I)
    x5 = shift(x4, UNITY)
    x6 = paint(x3, x5)
    x7 = asindices(x3)
    x8 = fork(difference, box, corners)
    x9 = x8(x7)
    x10 = lbind(lbind, manhattan)
    x11 = rbind(compose, initset)
    x12 = chain(x11, x10, initset)
    x13 = lbind(argmin, x5)
    x14 = chain(first, x13, x12)
    x15 = fork(astuple, x14, identity)
    x16 = apply(x15, x9)
    O = paint(x6, x16)
    return O
